n: Instance: Nakási Wave-reaper and the Heirs of Castamir

steps.t: Tatháta is beside the Heirsworn ship Phazanêg.
Aphadaer has decided to prove his loyalty to Balakhâd and the Heirs of Castamir by facing you in battle.
Nakási Wave-reaper has accomplished her mission, and she stares at you with contentment.
